title: The Hyrule Fantasy - A Legend of Zelda Story
description: Have you ever wanted a Zelda adventure, but in a regular survival world? Well same here.
body:
I know there are a couple Zelda mods out there, but I've never found one that did it the way I wish it was done. Now don't get me wrong, I still love those mods, and they are what really inspired me to make this. I feel like I can do it and have given it a lot of thought. 10 full notebook pages of information pertaining to this mod.


With that being said welcome to The Hyrule Fantasy! As of right now the mod is very barebones, but i plan on adding anything one would think would be in a Zelda game. I plan on adding dungeons, items galore, Zelda races, etc.


This mod currently adds 7 new items from The Legend of Zelda. These items include the Master Sword, Hylian shield, Kokiri sword, Kokiri shield, Biggoron Sword, Mirror shield and the bunny hood. All items are fully functional and have crafting recipes.


This mod aims to be its own self contained Zelda story within Minecraft. I plan on adding lore and secrets to uncover. I hope you will stick with me through the development of this mod, and most of all, i hope you enjoy!

Also if you would like to get updates, have questions, or suggestions join my discord at: [https://discord.gg/Dgx9ynPXyx](https://discord.gg/Dgx9ynPXyx)
